data.body: E1 DESCOPE NOTE (2026-07-16): E1's finding-adjudication TP/FP corpus was INVALIDATED (tool-less, plan-truncated labeling that doesn't match the whole-plan/code-grounded/agentic production gate; ~79 percent contaminated) and DESCOPED — the independent human-adjudicated gold set is parked as idea e59d-c078-724d-46e5. E1 still delivers the VALID outcome corpus + finding sample. This story (E3) draws its ~200-review sample from the E1 OUTCOME corpus. UNAFFECTED by the adjudication-corpus invalidation; proceed on the outcome corpus when resourced.
